label: Thumbnail
description: Wide thumbnail visual for video covers, tutorials, and explainer content.

optional.name: visualMotif
optional.description: Visual symbol that reinforces the topic

prompt.promptTemplate: Create a bold wide thumbnail image about {{topic}} for {{brandName}}.

fragments.subject: {{visualMotif}} representing {{topic}} for {{audience}}
fragments.composition: wide thumbnail crop, very strong focal point, clear empty zones for big title treatment
fragments.color: {{accentColor}} accent color with strong separation from the background
fragments.background: simple energetic backdrop with depth but low clutter
